comment: Test airports for VFR Outlook stress tests. Grouped by density profile.

dense.name: San Carlos Airport
dense.note: Bay Area — 20+ public airports within 50 miles

dense.name: Reid-Hillview
dense.note: South Bay — overlapping airspace with KSQL

dense.name: Hollywood Burbank
dense.note: LA basin — maximum airport density in CONUS

sparse.name: Bend Municipal
sparse.note: Eastern Oregon — few airports within 100 miles

trips.note: ~1000 mi Seattle→Denver, crosses Rockies, maximum corridor airports
~340 mi Bay Area→LA, coastal corridor, dense intermediate airports
~150 mi Portland→Seattle, I-5 corridor, moderate density

region_scenarios.note: Maximum fan-out: Bay Area at full radius and cap
Dense area, moderate radius — typical production query
Rural area at wide radius — few external calls, tests latency floor
LA basin max — highest possible outbound call density
